movies.title: Passenger
movies.description: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.

movies.title: Foreign Exchange
movies.description: A former escort who once “traveled the world” through his lovers, finally discovers true love. But when past clients reenter his life, he must confront old temptations and the challenges of loyalty, desire, and commitment.

movies.title: No Other Choice
movies.description: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a veteran paper mill manager descends into violence in a desperate bid to reclaim his dignity.

movies.title: Obsession
movies.description: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

movies.title: Sathi Leelavathi
movies.description: Leelavathi is a successful and spirited film director whose marriage with Ram Sethu begins falling apart. The relationship is strained by ego, changing gender roles, and the husband feeling overshadowed by his wife's success. Things complicate further when Sethu asks for a divorce and admits he has feelings for another woman, Nicola Sebastian. The couple is then forced to confront unresolved feelings and unearth hidden truths about their marriage.

movies.title: HIT: The Third Case
movies.description: The Homicide Intervention Team (HIT) sends ruthless police officer Arjun Sarkaar to find a group of killers and stop their grisly murder spree.

movies.title: The Wife
movies.description: Behind a struggling filmmaker stands a wife holding a marriage on the edge of collapse. When some hidden truths surface, her quiet endurance is tested beyond its limits.

movies.title: The Physician II
movies.description: 1050 AD: Robert Cole returns to England to bring the medical light of the Orient to his countrymen. But he fails because of the intrigues of the established London doctors, who feel threatened by the new knowledge. And it is not only the human body that is full of seemingly impenetrable secrets, the soul also holds its own mysteries.

movies.title: Deep Water
movies.description: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcome their differences if they hope to escape their sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.

movies.title: Father: The Judgement is inconclusive
movies.description: In the 1970s, in the Gampaha district, Desmond Gunasekara , a deeply religious young man from a very ordinary family, accidentally clashes with a crime gang led by a man named Gnane operating in the area.

tvShows.title: Teach You a Lesson
tvShows.description: When respect collapses in schools, unconventional inspectors arrive to set things right — with sharp, no-nonsense lessons you won't find in textbooks.

episodes.title: Episode 1
episodes.description: Inspector Na Hwa-jin steps into the chaos and takes control of a school plagued by the spoiled son of a powerful politician — to teach him a lesson.

episodes.title: Episode 2
episodes.description: With unassuming Bong Geun-dae on his side, Hwa-jin uses his special ops skills to handle a school gang and defend a student who just wants to study.

episodes.title: Episode 3
episodes.description: When a teen influencer spreads false claims about her teachers, the team's loose-cannon Inspector Im Han-rim steps in to set the record straight.

episodes.title: Episode 4
episodes.description: Choi Gang-seok weathers a political attack on his bureau. Hwa-jin's team visits an elite school to uncover why a student attacked a respected teacher.

episodes.title: Episode 5
episodes.description: When an elementary school teacher's spirit wears down under pressure, Hwa-jin steps in to be her substitute — turning the tables to solve the case.

episodes.title: Episode 6
episodes.description: Four juvenile delinquents think they're above the law — until the team takes an interest in their extracurricular crimes and gives a harsh reality check.

episodes.title: Episode 7
episodes.description: Geun-dae goes undercover to help a father find his gambling addict son. To undermine the bureau politically, Hwang Gi-tae visits a juvenile inmate.

episodes.title: Episode 8
episodes.description: After a pre-med student collapses in class, Hwa-jin investigates his obsessive mother, whose access to illicit pills hints at a larger conspiracy.

episodes.title: Episode 9
episodes.description: To help a student escape his exploitative friends, Han-rim adopts a new persona to join his circle. Cho Gyu-cheol's return puts the bureau in danger.

episodes.title: Episode 10
episodes.description: After public backlash hits the bureau, Hwa-jin and his team go rogue to expose a deadly conspiracy led by a violent student-run gang.

tvShows.title: Spider-Noir
tvShows.description: Ben Reilly, an aging and down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, is forced to grapple with his past life as the city's one and only superhero.

episodes.title: Step into My Office
episodes.description: It won't end the way you want it to.

episodes.title: Tread Lightly
episodes.description: You're an investigator. Investigate.

episodes.title: Double Cross
episodes.description: The quicker you prove it, the quicker they die.

episodes.title: A Mistake I'll Never Make Again
episodes.description: I don't know, I think he's still got it.

episodes.title: Betrayal
episodes.description: Careful is for stock tips and hot sauce.

episodes.title: Nightmare on a Gurney
episodes.description: If you haven't found the answer, it's because there isn't one.

episodes.title: Nobody's Hero
episodes.description: I can't protect you when I'm dead.

episodes.title: The Man in the Mask
episodes.description: Gee whiz, what's a down-on-his-luck private investigator to do?

tvShows.title: Off Campus
tvShows.description: Hannah Wells tutors hockey captain Garrett Graham to win over her crush. Their deal becomes real connection as they face their pasts. Friends Logan, Dean, Tucker, and Allie navigate college life and love.

episodes.title: The Deal
episodes.description: A hockey-averse music major and Briar U's womanizing star center strike an unlikely deal to get her crush's attention and his grades up.

episodes.title: The Practice
episodes.description: Hannah and Garrett's faux relationship is put to the test as they are forced to share a room at an overnight house party.

episodes.title: The Orgasm
episodes.description: Just as Hannah and Garrett's deal begins working like a charm, Hannah ups the stakes by redefining the terms.

episodes.title: The Breakup
episodes.description: Hannah and Garrett get closer than either anticipated and things get messy when they're forced to confront their feelings at Drunk Shakespeare.

episodes.title: The Cold Turkey
episodes.description: Garrett brings Hannah home for Thanksgiving while Tucker hosts an epic Friendsgiving at the Off Campus house.

episodes.title: The Breakaway
episodes.description: At a hockey fundraiser, Garrett and Logan butt heads, Hannah and Justin's musical collaboration encounters its biggest hurdle, and romance simmers.

episodes.title: The Faceoff
episodes.description: Hannah confronts her past while Garrett faces the most challenging game of his season and Allie meets her hero.

episodes.title: The Line Change
episodes.description: As the semester ends, fallout from the St. Anthony's game rattles the Hawks, and Hannah strives to find her voice.

tvShows.title: The Tomorrow People
tvShows.description: The story of several young people from around the world who represent the next stage in human evolution, possessing special powers, including the ability to teleport and communicate with each other telepathically. Together they work to defeat the forces of evil.

episodes.title: Pilot
episodes.description: When Stephen Jameson begins hearing voices and waking up in strange places, he starts to question his sanity. In desperation, Stephen decides to listen to one of the voices in his head, and it leads him to his first encounter with the Tomorrow People — John, Cara and Russell — a genetically advanced race with the abilities of telekinesis, teleportation and telepathic communication. The Tomorrow People inform him that they are being hunted down by a paramilitary group of scientists known as Ultra, led by Dr. Jedikiah Price. Meanwhile, Stephen gets another surprise that leads him down his own path, which he hopes will help him uncover the truth about his father’s mysterious disappearance.

episodes.title: In Too Deep
episodes.description: When Ultra tries to probe Stephen's brain, he looks to his fellow Tomorrow People for help, but is rebuffed by an angry John, leaving Cara to go behind John's back to help Stephen. Meanwhile, Ultra tracks down the identity of a new break-out, who has been using his powers to commit crimes. Stephen tracks down the new break-out, but is shocked when an Ultra swat team is called in. At a loss for what to do, Stephen calls on John, Cara and Russell for help, leaving them with a risk of also getting caught. Upon learning of Ultra's evil motives, John tries to convince Stephen to spy on Ultra to help save other potential Tomorrow People, while still pursuing the answers he seeks about this father.

episodes.title: Girl, Interrupted
episodes.description: Stephen reluctantly attends a party with Astrid, but is startled when he hears that one of his classmates is in peril. Desperate to help, Stephen turns to John and Cara, but they make it clear that they do not help humans. Stephen secretly tries to enlist Cara’s help, which brings up her own feelings about her traumatic past. Meanwhile, John gives Stephen a mission to infiltrate Ultra’s main computer to help give them an advantage in finding new break-outs.

episodes.title: Kill or Be Killed
episodes.description: When Ultra's most wanted, Killian McCrane, resurfaces after years of being in hiding, Stephen enlists John's help in tracking him down. John reluctantly agrees to help, but changes his mind when he learns that Killian isn't after Jedikiah as everyone suspects. Stephen, wants to help, but Cara explains that John's history with Killian, which brings back a flood of memories from John's past, making him do something he never thought he would do again. Meanwhile, Stephen's mom is suspicious of his whereabouts, putting him in an awkward position.

episodes.title: All Tomorrow's Parties
episodes.description: After Stephen breaks Ultra protocol during a training exercise, Jedikiah’s mysterious boss insists on meeting Stephen.  Stephen grows concerned when he learns Jedikiah is unable to protect him, so he turns to John, who is only interested for selfish reasons. Elsewhere, the Tomorrow People are desperate to go topside to a party like normal people, but John and Cara disagree on the dangerous plan. Meanwhile, Stephen makes a plan to go to Homecoming with Astrid, but when he bails on her once again, she decides to find out what he is really up too.

episodes.title: Sorry for Your Loss
episodes.description: When Stephen and Russell head out for a night of fun, they run into a potential new break-out. Stephen and Russell report back to John and Cara about the new person, but they want to keep a low profile from Ultra. Sadly, Russell learns that his dad has passed away and he is torn about whether or not he should go home. John volunteers to accompany Russell to help keep him out of trouble. Meanwhile, Jedikiah has a shocking secret that could destroy his career.

episodes.title: Limbo
episodes.description: When Stephen decides to have some fun with his newfound powers, Jedikiah takes extreme measures to make sure it doesn’t happen again. After John and Russell return from their trip, John feels a strange tension between himself and Cara. Stephen tries to handle a new and dangerous breakout on his own, but finds himself in over his head and needing help from his fellow Tomorrow People.

episodes.title: Thanatos
episodes.description: Stephen is determined to uncover what he hopes is the key to finding his father, and crafts a plan with the Tomorrow People that involves getting inside Jedikiah's head. Meanwhile, Cara and Russell encounter an uninvited visitor in the subway tunnel base. Stephen takes a risky opportunity and snoops around Ultra.

episodes.title: Death's Door
episodes.description: When John finds himself in a dangerous situation, Stephen is unable to help without revealing himself to Ultra. Not satisfied with the answer he has discovered about his father's disappearance, Stephen decides to take drastic measures with the help of his fellow Tomorrow People to find out the truth.  Meanwhile, Cara and Russell negotiate a trade with Jedikiah, which ultimately makes Jedikiah take a big risk.

episodes.title: The Citadel
episodes.description: After Stephen returns from the brink, he thinks he has a clue to what happened to his father, but his fellow Tomorrow People are not sure they believe him. When the Tomorrow People learn some disappointing news from John, they make an unexpected decision about their future. The Tomorrow People finally get a lead on Ultra’s secret research lab and they devise a dangerous plan to free all those being held captive there. Meanwhile, Stephen’s mom introduces Stephen and his brother Luca to a new man she is dating, but Stephen is having a hard time getting a read on him.

episodes.title: Rumble
episodes.description: Stephen and his fellow Ultra trainees are given a test by Jedikiah to see who is worthy of becoming an Ultra agent, but not everyone is happy to work as a team. Cara is faced with a mysterious visitor from her past. Russell is sent on a dangerous recon mission that could force a clash between Tomorrow People groups. Meanwhile, John works with a new break-out.

episodes.title: Sitting Ducks
episodes.description: Stephen feels uneasy about his fellow trainee Hillary who has a secret agenda of her own. Stephen's mom wants the family to go camping including her new boyfriend Peter, whom Stephen seems to be having a difficult time reading. Knowing he is going to be out of town, Stephen asks for Cara and John's help to make sure that everything is ok with Astrid while he's gone.

episodes.title: Things Fall Apart
episodes.description: Stephen is upset with Jedikiah for going back on his word, leaving Stephen to face The Founder. In order to protect Astrid, Stephen has to make a dangerous deal to bring in a powerful break-out. John and Cara clash, forcing Cara to issue a harsh and unexpected punishment. Meanwhile, Stephen learns a surprising secret about his mom.

episodes.title: Brother's Keeper
episodes.description: After getting some shocking news, Stephen attempts to restore order in both his worlds by making a deal with Jedikiah. With a new break-out on the loose, Cara and Russell try to lure him in but must contend with a trap from Ultra. Meanwhile, Jedikiah is closer to developing a new secret technology that could change his future.

episodes.title: Enemy of My Enemy
episodes.description: Julian is back and angrier than ever, but when he gets caught by Ultra he is forced to strike a deal that could cost his and Stephen’s lives. John once again disobeys Cara’s orders when he learns the Julian has discovered the location of the Tomorrow People’s lair. Meanwhile, Astrid is plagued by nightmares after her near-death experience and turns to her new friend John for some comfort.

episodes.title: Superhero
episodes.description: Stephen is still walking a fine line with his Ultra partner Hillary, who continues to be suspicious of his loyalties. When the Tomorrow People and Ultra learn that there is a new break-out doing good for humans, they both want her on their side. Meanwhile, Morgan takes a risk and betrays Jedikiah’s trust to help the Tomorrow People, but what Jedikiah discovers from Morgan is an even bigger surprise.

episodes.title: Endgame
episodes.description: Stephen stumbles upon a clue that the Tomorrow People have been desperately searching for. John and Russell learn of a dangerous plan that Jedikiah has in the works, but no one could have predicted the ultimate outcome. Meanwhile, Cara gets a lead on a new break-out, but is shocked to discover that it’s someone from her past.

episodes.title: Smoke and Mirrors
episodes.description: Fed up with Jedikiah’s constant lies about his father, Stephen makes a choice about his alliances. Trusting in Ultra and Hillary, Stephen wants to bring in a break-out to Ultra to see if things have really changed, much to Cara’s dismay. Meanwhile, Stephen’s brother goes missing after Jedikiah forces Stephen to protect him.

episodes.title: Modus Vivendi
episodes.description: Stephen’s hard work as a double agent seems to be paying off with a potential truce between the Tomorrow People and Ultra. Still untrusting, Cara sends Russell to meet with The Founder. Jedikiah is now on the run and is desperate to keep Ultra from discovering his secret. Meanwhile, with the help of Hillary, Stephen tries to contact his dad once again.

episodes.title: A Sort of Homecoming
episodes.description: With the possible return of Roger on the horizon, everyone is concerned about the consequences if The Founder were to find out. Stephen now knows the truth about the machine The Founder has been using him to train in and needs John and Cara’s help to destroy it.  Meanwhile, Russell and other Tomorrow People have lost hope they will ever find The Refuge and choose to head out on their own.

episodes.title: Kill Switch
episodes.description: When the Tomorrow People learn the truth about the serum they were injected with, Stephen and Cara attempt to buy time for Jedikiah while he tries to create a possible antidote. Growing impatient, Russell and the other rogue Tomorrow People make a rash decision to sacrifice Roger to Ultra for their own safety. Meanwhile, John is having a hard time figuring out his new role and the only one he can turn to for advice is Astrid.

episodes.title: Son of Man
episodes.description: Russell realizes his alliance with The Founder was a mistake, and tries to make up for his decision by saving Cara from an Ultra ambush. Stephen understands that he must be the one to stop The Machine and the extermination of humanity, but he fears he may be too late. Russell offers up a plan to help Stephen, but he is going to need everyone’s help, including John and Astrid, if they are going to have any chance to survive. Meanwhile, Jedikiah offers John an interesting opportunity that could have them working together again.

tvShows.title: The Other Bennet Sister
tvShows.description: Mary isn't your typical period drama heroine. She is awkward, anxious, preachy, full of facts, a terrible singer, overlooked by her mother and seemingly destined to an empty dance card for the rest of her life… until Mary takes matters into her own hands.

episodes.title: Chapter 1
episodes.description: Mary Bennet longs to shine as brightly as her sisters but often feels overlooked. She hopes to finally win her family’s approval at the upcoming Meryton assembly.

episodes.title: Chapter 2
episodes.description: After a disappointing night at the ball, Mary sets aside hopes of finding a match. But when a visitor arrives at Longbourn with a surprising proposal, she must rethink her plan.

episodes.title: Chapter 3
episodes.description: After a family tragedy, Mary and her mother are left facing an uncertain future – until Mary receives an unexpected offer from her aunt and uncle.

episodes.title: Chapter 4
episodes.description: As Mary is finding her footing in London, she overhears something which knocks her confidence. Mary’s connection with Mr Hayward is complicated by his engagement to Mary’s friend Ann.

episodes.title: Chapter 5
episodes.description: Mary begins to flourish in London society, but a run-in with an old rival and troubling news from home threaten her growing confidence and force her to face up to the past.

episodes.title: Chapter 6
episodes.description: Mary rushes to Pemberley, where she is swept back into her family’s orbit. It feels as if Mary is right back where she started – until a visit from Mr Ryder shakes things up.

episodes.title: Chapter 7
episodes.description: Mary weighs up an offer from Mr Ryder. Under pressure from her mother, Mary must decide what she truly wants and if she has the courage to disappoint her family one more time.

episodes.title: Chapter 8
episodes.description: Mary finds peace and a growing connection with Mr Hayward in the Lake District – until the arrival of a group of unexpected guests threatens their new understanding.

episodes.title: Chapter 9
episodes.description: During a group hike up Scafell Pike, Mary prepares to speak her heart, but a fateful miscommunication and a sudden storm threaten to throw everything off course.

episodes.title: Chapter 10
episodes.description: Mary receives a surprising offer and faces renewed pressure from her mother to find a match. With Mr Hayward absent from London, she must decide what happiness looks like for her.

tvShows.title: Ted Lasso
tvShows.description: Ted Lasso, an American football coach, moves to England when he's hired to manage a soccer team—despite having no experience. With cynical players and a doubtful town, will he get them to see the Ted Lasso Way?

episodes.title: Pilot
episodes.description: American football coach Ted Lasso is hired by a wealthy divorcée to coach the English soccer team AFC Richmond.

episodes.title: Biscuits
episodes.description: It's Ted's first day of coaching, and fans aren't happy. He makes little headway but remains undeterred as the team plays its first match.

episodes.title: Trent Crimm: The Independent
episodes.description: To arrange an in-depth exposé, Rebecca pairs cynical journalist Trent Crimm with Ted for a day. Ted and Roy venture into the community.

episodes.title: For the Children
episodes.description: Rebecca hosts the team's annual charity benefit, where Ted stages a reconciliation between Roy and Jamie.

episodes.title: Tan Lines
episodes.description: With his wife and son visiting from America, Ted makes drastic changes to the lineup during a critical match.

episodes.title: Two Aces
episodes.description: When Jamie refuses to train, Ted turns to talented new signing Dani Rojas—and the team is struck by an age-old curse.

episodes.title: Make Rebecca Great Again
episodes.description: Rebecca celebrates her first anniversary as a divorcée as the team plays a match in Liverpool.

episodes.title: The Diamond Dogs
episodes.description: Ted and Roy are both having relationship problems. Ted consults the Diamond Dogs while Roy has a talk with Keeley.

episodes.title: All Apologies
episodes.description: After a series of mistakes on the pitch, pressure mounts to bench Roy. Rebecca drops a bombshell.

episodes.title: The Hope That Kills You
episodes.description: Richmond plays a climactic match that will determine the fates of Ted and his club.

episodes.title: Goodbye Earl
episodes.description: AFC Richmond brings in a sports psychologist to help the team overcome their unprecedented seven game tie-streak.

episodes.title: Lavender
episodes.description: Ted is surprised by the reappearance of a familiar face. Roy tries out a new gig.

episodes.title: Do the Right-est Thing
episodes.description: Rebecca has a special visitor shadow her at work. A player's return is not welcomed by the team.

episodes.title: Carol of the Bells
episodes.description: It's Christmas in Richmond. Rebecca enlists Ted for a secret mission, Roy and Keeley search for a miracle, and the Higginses open up their home.

episodes.title: Rainbow
episodes.description: Nate learns how to be assertive from Keeley and Rebecca. Ted asks Roy for a favor.

episodes.title: The Signal
episodes.description: Ted is fired up that the new team dynamic seems to be working. But will they have a chance in the quarterfinal?

episodes.title: Headspace
episodes.description: With things turning around for Richmond, it's time for everyone to work on their issues—like Ted's discomfort, Nate's confidence, and Roy's attention.

episodes.title: Man City
episodes.description: Ted and Dr. Sharon realize they might have to meet each other halfway. Tensions are high as the team prepares for the semifinal.

episodes.title: Beard After Hours
episodes.description: After the semifinal, Beard sets out on an all-night odyssey through London in an effort to collect his thoughts.

episodes.title: No Weddings and a Funeral
episodes.description: Rebecca is stunned by a sudden loss. The team rallies to show their support, but Ted finds himself grappling with a piece of his past.

episodes.title: Midnight Train to Royston
episodes.description: A billionaire football enthusiast from Ghana makes Sam an unbelievable offer. Ted plans something special for Dr. Sharon's last day with the team.

episodes.title: Inverting the Pyramid of Success
episodes.description: Richmond gets their final chance to win promotion as Ted deals with the fallout of Trent Crimm's painfully honest exposé.

tvShows.title: Bloodhounds
tvShows.description: Faced with ruthless foes with a violent thirst, two young boxers band together — risking life and limb to bring justice and protect their loved ones.

episodes.title: Episode 1
episodes.description: After a thrilling boxing match, Kim Gun-woo befriends Hong Woo-jin. Kim Myeong-gil's business ambitions come into focus, with dangerous tactics at play.

episodes.title: Episode 2
episodes.description: Gun-woo meets with Choi Tae-ho to remedy his mother's debt. Myeong-gil endures a humiliating meeting with Hong Min-beom and grows revengeful.

episodes.title: Episode 3
episodes.description: Gun-woo and Woo-jin figure out how to take down the scam ring. Myeong-gil gains the upper hand on Min-beom.

episodes.title: Episode 4
episodes.description: After the group faces a close call, President Choi plans his own operation. But as their plans fall into place, the enemies stand in their way.

episodes.title: Episode 5
episodes.description: After narrowly escaping a threat, the group trains for what's coming — and President Choi and his men look to extract valuable information.

episodes.title: Episode 6
episodes.description: The group celebrates as they get ready for their next move. More exposed than ever before, Myeong-gil goes after President Choi and his guards.

episodes.title: Episode 7
episodes.description: After an unthinkable setback, Gun-woo and Woo-jin resolve to come back with a vengeance — later partnering with an unlikely figure.

episodes.title: Episode 8
episodes.description: Galvanized by their duty to their loved ones, Gun-woo and Woo-jin tread forward to take down Myeong-gil — once and for all.

episodes.title: Episode 1
episodes.description: Going up against a formidable champion, Kim Gun-woo prepares for an upcoming fight. But in the shadows, the brutal Im Baek-jeong hunts him.

episodes.title: Episode 2
episodes.description: Gun-woo puts his mother’s safety first. Hong Woo-jin turns to an old friend for help. But Baek-jeong's men soon catch up after tailing their every move.

episodes.title: Episode 3
episodes.description: Gun-woo discovers just how sophisticated IKFC is — and that he could potentially get pulled in. Meanwhile, Baek-jeong finds another target to lure him.

episodes.title: Episode 4
episodes.description: Tension rises after Baek-jeong puts Gun-woo’s close ally at risk. As Baek-jeong’s group comes to light, Min Gang-yong plans a mission to hunt him down.

episodes.title: Episode 5
episodes.description: Backed into a corner, Gun-woo decides to face Baek-jeong himself. But things take a turn — further fueling Baek-jeong’s rage to new heights.

episodes.title: Episode 6
episodes.description: Gun-woo and Woo-jin zero in on what makes Baek-jeong vulnerable. Gang-yong makes a final move to capture Baek-jeong, but the task is full of danger.

episodes.title: Episode 7
episodes.description: Hong Min-beom devises a plan to end the madness for good — pitting Gun-woo and Woo-jin in a final fight against formidable foes for lasting peace.

tvShows.title: Gold Land
tvShows.description: A young woman working as an airport security agent accidentally comes into possession of a smuggling ring’s gold bars. Caught in a chaotic whirlwind of greed and betrayal among various parties vying for the gold, she becomes consumed by the desire to claim it all for herself.

episodes.title: Betting
episodes.description: Customs officer Hee-ju agrees to help her pilot boyfriend Do-kyung with a suspicious deal.

episodes.title: Homecoming
episodes.description: Hiding in the one place she swore she'd never return, Hee-ju guards the gold from her pursuers.

episodes.title: Partnership
episodes.description: Woogy makes Hee-ju an offer she can’t refuse, as Director Park steps up his search for the gold.

episodes.title: Him
episodes.description: Sun-ok takes the fall for Hee-ju’s crime. In return, Hee-ju prepares one final surprise for her.

episodes.title: Secret
episodes.description: Hee-ju joins forces with Woogy but doesn't trust him. As the others close in, Hee-ju stands alone.

episodes.title: Fissure
episodes.description: The owner of the gold bars returns and Director Park spirals out of control.

episodes.title: Villains
episodes.description: Hee-ju doesn't hide her desire for the gold, and Jin-man learns an unexpected truth.

episodes.title: Choice
episodes.description: Jin-man is shocked and confused after discovering Hee-ju's identity and Woogy finds himself in danger.

episodes.title: Consequences
episodes.description: Jin-man makes a bold move and Do-kyung goes to see Hee-ju.

episodes.title: Gold Land
episodes.description: Everyone chasing the gold finally arrives in the same place.

tvShows.title: Sweet Home
tvShows.description: As humans turn into savage monsters and the world plunges into terror, a handful of survivors fight for their lives — and to hold on to their humanity.

episodes.title: Episode 1
episodes.description: Cha Hyun-su moves into the run-down Green Home by himself. Not long after, he witnesses a disturbing sight in his neighbor's apartment.

episodes.title: Episode 2
episodes.description: As a state of emergency is declared, the residents tie up Pyeon Sang-wook for being bitten. Hyun-su is unable to ignore a family in distress.

episodes.title: Episode 3
episodes.description: An unexpected savior protects the children from harm as Hyun-su, together with Yoon Ji-su and Jung Jae-heon, tries to bring them to safety.

episodes.title: Episode 4
episodes.description: Critical information about the monsters is made public. When residents are split on what to do with Hyun-su, Lee Eun-hyeok suggests they hold a vote.

episodes.title: Episode 5
episodes.description: Tasked to carry out dangerous missions, Hyun-su heads back to retrieve Han Du-sik. Sang-wook stops at nothing to finish what he started.

episodes.title: Episode 6
episodes.description: An Seon-yeong confronts the greatest monster in her life. Leaving the building, Seo Yi-kyung heads to her fiancé's office in search of answers.

episodes.title: Episode 7
episodes.description: Hyun-su saves the others from a deadly attack. Running out of necessities, Eun-hyeok announces a plan to venture outside for resources.

episodes.title: Episode 8
episodes.description: Having little options in her state of being, Ji-su agrees to take a big risk. Yi-kyung returns to Green Home just in time.

episodes.title: Episode 9
episodes.description: When a team of outlaws take over the building, the residents are shown how humans can be even more barbaric than the monsters.

episodes.title: Episode 10
episodes.description: A military leaflet promises a route to safety, but the group is reluctant to trust it. Hyun-su is exposed to a new perspective on his condition.

tvShows.title: රොබින්සන් අන්දරය - The Adventures of Swiss Family Robinson
tvShows.description: Classic saga of the merchant and his family shipwrecked on a South Seas island. This adaptation of the Johann David Wyss tale was one of the Pax network's initial offerings.
